name: Flappy Birds Smash
description: It’s a fun arcade game, and it is not as easy as it looks. It has a simple but not rough pixel picture, a little bird. Gameplay You need to constantly control the frequency of clicking on the screen to adjust the flying height and landing speed of the bird, so that the bird can smoothly pass through the pipe gap on the right side of the screen. Prepare for a thrilling twist on the classic bird-shooting game with Angry Flappy Birds.
